body:
## Problem
The /bands/<slug> SSR handler was missing MusicGroup and BreadcrumbList JSON-LD. App.js emitted MusicGroup client-side only — invisible to crawlers. Same bug class as #1347 (lick pages SSR schema).

## Status
Already shipped. Fix was applied in:
- #1502 (fa23db5): initial MusicGroup + BreadcrumbList added to /bands/<slug> SSR handler
- #1534 (b47979b): populated MusicGroup member array via drummerHistory slug lookup
- Confirmed present in api/meta/[...path].js lines 963-988

## Current state
All 19 /bands/<slug> pages return:
- articleSchema: JSON-LD MusicGroup with name, url, genre[], member[]
- breadcrumbSchema: [{Home}, {Bands}, {band.name}]
- faqSchema: FAQPage items (unchanged)

No code changes required this run.
title: SEO batch: Band pages — MusicGroup + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD missing from SSR (~19 pages)
